description: John Vickerman is a global HR leader with over 30 years of senior director experience in the UK and internationally. He has spearheaded numerous high-profile projects at prestigious organisations, including the BBC, BP Plc, C&W, and the MOD Navy. Following a four-year tenure as Chief Human Resources Officer for a leading Middle Eastern tech company, John’s most recent role was at Fujitsu, where he successfully led the UK&I business through a major transition programme and managed Employee Relations across Europe. John is a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Personnel Development (FCIPD) and a Leadership Fellow of St George’s House, Windsor Castle. He holds a master’s degree in business administration (MBA) and is a qualified Executive Coach with Henley Management College.

details.body:
John Vickerman is a global HR leader with over 30 years of senior director experience in the UK and internationally. He has spearheaded numerous high-profile projects at prestigious organisations, including the BBC, BP Plc, C&W, and the MOD Navy.

Following a four-year tenure as Chief Human Resources Officer for a leading Middle Eastern tech company, John’s most recent role was at Fujitsu, where he successfully led the UK&I business through a major transition programme and managed Employee Relations across Europe.

John is a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Personnel Development (FCIPD) and a Leadership Fellow of St George’s House, Windsor Castle. He holds a master’s degree in business administration (MBA) and is a qualified Executive Coach with Henley Management College.

John Vickerman is a global HR leader with over 30 years of senior director experience in the UK and internationally. He has spearheaded numerous high-profile projects at prestigious organisations, including the BBC, BP Plc, C&W, and the MOD Navy.

Following a four-year tenure as Chief Human Resources Officer for a leading Middle Eastern tech company, John’s most recent role was at Fujitsu, where he successfully led the UK&I business through a major transition programme and managed Employee Relations across Europe.

John is a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Personnel Development (FCIPD) and a Leadership Fellow of St George’s House, Windsor Castle. He holds a master’s degree in business administration (MBA) and is a qualified Executive Coach with Henley Management College.

The Chief People Officer is responsible for all areas of Human Resources within Magnox, including resourcing, employee and industrial relations, reward, learning and development and organisational change.

title: John Vickerman
